item.title: BcvReader

myActionBar = html`<my-bcvreader></my-bcvreader>`

item.title: OsisParserUI

myOsisParser = html`<my-osisparserui></my-osisparserui>`

item.title: historic quarto-svelte example
item.description:
This document shows you how to use a basic example Svelte component called Circles.svelte.

Create one using an HTML template:

myCircles = html`<my-circles></my-circles>`

Now the fun part - updating our visual when our document changes. It’s as simple as changing the prop using componentName.propName =.

For example, here are three datasets and an Observable Inputs dropdown menu that lets you select one of three datasets:

// here are some datasets...
allDatasets = new Map([
    ["Dataset A", [5, 15, 25, 17, 8]],
    ["Dataset B", [25, 5, 5]],
    ["Dataset C", [12, 5, 8, 21, 5]]
  ]);
viewof selectedDataset =
  Inputs.select(allDatasets, { label: "Selected dataset" });

Now we can update the prop data of the visual myCircles using:

myCircles.data = selectedDataset

And there you go! 🚀

For more help writing Svelte components, check out the Svelte tutorial or take look at some of the examples in the quarto-svelte documentation.

item.title: OjsUi
item.description:
FIX KO btn.value is an Object

viewof myButton = {
  const btn = html`<button>Click for Data</button>`;
  btn.onclick = () => {
    btn.value = { timestamp: Date.now(), user: "Admin", action: "Verify" };
    btn.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("input")); // Tells OJS to update
  };
  return btn;
}

// Access the object in a different cell
myButton
import {viewofHello} from "./ojsui.js"
viewof mihello = viewofHello();
mihello;
import {bsButton} from "./ojsui.js"

viewof mibutton = bsButton("HiBs");

html`<pre>${JSON.stringify(mibutton,null,2)}</pre>`
restyling = {
  // Very Great Restyling Side Effects
//const mib =   viewof mibutton.querySelectorAll('button.btn-quarto');
//if (mib) {
//    mib.forEach(btn => { btn.classList.remove("btn-quarto")});
//  }
//
0};

item.title: OsisParser
item.description:
strict idempotent OSIS conversion for biblegateway.

myOsisParser = html`<my-osisparser></my-osisparser>`

item.title: MVC_ojs
item.description:
How to separate MVC concerns and Master styling

viewof amount = Inputs.range([0, 100], {
  label: "Amount",
  step: 1,
  value: 20
})

double = amount * 2


html`
  <div class="card p-3 my-3">
    <h5>Demo</h5>
    <div class="mb-3">${viewof amount}</div>
    <p>Double: <strong>${double}</strong></p>
  </div>
`
myNumberInput = (label, value = 0) => {
  const input = Inputs.number({label, value})
  const box = html`<div class="my-2">${input}</div>`
  Object.defineProperty(box, "value", {
    get: () => input.value
  })
  box.addEventListener("input", () =>
    box.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles: true}))
  )
  return box
}

viewof qty = myNumberInput("Quantity", 3)
qty
html`<p>Total: ${qty * 10}</p>`
InputGroupWithButton = (placeholder = "here", label = "Go", variant = "primary") => {
  const group = html`<div class="input-group"></div>`

  const input = html`<input class="form-control" placeholder="${placeholder}">`

  // Quarto-safe wrapper around the button
  const btnWrap = html`<div class="ojs-safe"></div>`
  const btn = html`<button class="btn btn-${variant}">${label}</button>`
  btnWrap.append(btn)

  group.append(input, btnWrap)
  return group
}

viewof igwb = InputGroupWithButton();

html`<div>Total: ${igwb}</div>`

item.title: BsUi
item.description:
FIX OK .current, .accu OK restyle with queueMicrotask and MutationObserver OK transform

// bsButton: Bootstrap-styled button, OJS-compatible, written as plain class javascript.

import {bsButton} from "./bsui.js"

viewof run = new bsButton({
  label: "RAZ",
  variant: "warning",
  value: { action: "run" }
}).node()

run
import { bsInput } from "./bsui.js"

viewof name = new bsInput({
  label: "Your name",
  placeholder: "Type here…",
  description: "bsInput: Bootstrap-styled text input, OJS-compatible as plain js class",
  value: "Pier"
}).node()

name
import { bsInputgroup } from "./bsui.js"

viewof ig = new bsInputgroup({
  placeholder: "Type something…",
  buttonLabel: "Accumulate",
  variant: "success"
}).node()

ig.current
ig
import { bsInputgroup3 } from "./bsui.js"

viewof ig3 = new bsInputgroup3({
  placeholder: "Hi Type something3…",
  prefixHTML: '<i class="bi bi-search"></i>',
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip",
  variant: "primary"
}).node()

ig3.current
ig3

bsInputgroupTransform

import { bsInputgroupTransform } from "./bsui.js"

viewof ig_tfr = new bsInputgroupTransform({
  placeholder: "Hi Type something tfrm…",
  prefixHTML: '<i class="bi bi-search"></i>',
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip",
  variant: "primary"
}).node()

ig_tfr.current
ig_tfr

Reusable Svelte component with Styling

myActionBar = html`<my-actionbar2></my-actionbar2>`

item.title: Verse Workflow
item.description:
For Bible Reference From UserInput To Display

  1. UserInput is Free Text Transformed to strict OSIS Then as_is_passthrough to service worker fetching. => parse.hsub_entities()

  • UserInput accepts free text as does bcv_parser

  • Parsing delivers Strict Idempotent String like (Gen.1.2 SG21); (Gal.2.8,Phil.4.6 KJV)

  • and HSUB_RefArray aka hsub_entities() like [“Gen.1.2!SG21”,“Gal.2.8,Phil.4.6!KJV”] with elements acceptable to hsubre service worker.

  • URL service worker

  • where to put fetch ?

myOsisParser = html`<my-osisparserui></my-osisparserui>`

With surrounding .card

item.title: ObjectFactory
item.description:
Inspired by Svelte ButtonBar & verseRun: todo: style it add input

Todo: inlne row + Styling à la svlete 
obj = ({
  first: "Ada",
  last: "Lovelace",
  age: 36
})
import {objectInput} from "./obj_ojs.js"

viewof person = objectInput(obj);

person
import { bootstrapNumberInput } from "./obj_ojs.js"

viewof price = bootstrapNumberInput({
  value: 10,
  min: 0,
  prefix: "€"
})

price
import { bootstrapAccumulatingTextInput } from "./obj_ojs.js"

viewof items = bootstrapAccumulatingTextInput({
  prefix: "➕",
  placeholder: "Type something",
  addLabel: "Add",
  razLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip"
})

items
import { bootstrapAccumulatingTextInputBar } from "./obj_ojs.js"

viewof itemsbar = bootstrapAccumulatingTextInputBar({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-search'></i>",
  placeholder: "TextInputBar",
  inputClass: "form-control",
  addLabel: "Add",
  razLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip"
})

itemsbar
import { bootstrapAccumulatingTextInputBar2 } from "./obj_ojs.js"

viewof itemsbar2 = bootstrapAccumulatingTextInput({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-search'></i>",
  placeholder: "Type something",
  inputClass: "my-custom-input",
  addLabel: "Add",
  razLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip"
})

itemsbar2
import { bootstrapAccumulatingTextInput2 } from "./obj_ojs.js"

viewof items2 = bootstrapAccumulatingTextInput2({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-search'></i>",
  placeholder: "TextInput2",
  addLabel: "Add",
  razLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "Clip"
})

items2
items2.map((x, i) => `${i+1}. ${x}`)
restyling = {
  // Very Great Restyling Side Effects
const mib =   viewof items2.querySelectorAll('button.btn-quarto');
if (mib) {
    mib.forEach(btn => { btn.classList.remove("btn-quarto")});
  }
};

  button: "Add"
})

item.title: SharedSvelteCounter

myCompA = html`<my-componenta></my-componenta>`
myCompB = html`<my-componentb></my-componentb>`

item.title: OJS-Restyling
item.description:
OJS Inputs are restyled

OJS Inputs.text

viewof styledBtn2 = Inputs.button("Submit");

OJS Inputs.button

viewof mytext = Inputs.text({
    placeholder: "say it",
    value: ""
    });

html`<div>${viewof mytext}</div>`;
html`<input type="text" class="form-control">`

now Restyled

restyling = {
  // Very Great Restyling Side Effects
  const mib = viewof styledBtn2.querySelector('button.btn-quarto');
  if (mib) {
    mib.classList.remove('btn-quarto');
    mib.classList.add("btn", "btn-success", "btn-lg"); 
  }
};
// --- Reusable Bootstrap Input Group Factory --- //

function InputGroup({ placeholder = "Type…", button = "Go" } = {}) {
  // 1. Create the input
  const input = html`<input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="${placeholder}">`;

  // 2. Create the button
  const btn = html`<button class="btn btn-primary">${button}</button>`;

  // 3. Create the input-group wrapper
  const group = html`<div class="input-group"></div>`;
  group.append(input, btn);

  // 4. Reactive value
  group.value = "";

  // 5. Emit reactive updates on button click
  btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    group.value = input.value;
    group.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("input"));
  });

  return group;
}
viewof myInput = InputGroup({ placeholder: "Search…", button: "Run" })

myInput
restyling2 = {
  // Very Great Restyling Side Effects
  const mib = viewof myInput.querySelector('button.btn-quarto');
  if (mib) {
    mib.classList.remove('btn-quarto');
    mib.classList.add("btn", "btn-success"); 
  }
};

item.title: ButtonsBuildUp
item.description:
Buttons from Naked to Bootstrap styling

Make OJS Inputs and Reactive Restyling !

<form class=“oi-3a86ea”><button class=“btn btn-warning”>Store</button></form>

HTML Buttons Naked (no-attributes, no-styling)

HTML Buttons with .btn.btn-primary (yields Bootstrap styling)

HTML Output: placeholder output area

OJS Input.button

viewof myButton = Inputs.button("Clip");
viewof styledBtn = {
  const btn = Inputs.button("Submit");
  // Find the button element inside the generated div and add classes
//  const inputElement = btn.querySelector("button");
//  inputElement.classList.add("btn", "btn-success", "btn-lg"); 
  return btn;
}

viewof styledBtn2 = Inputs.button("Submit");
restyling = {
  // Very Great Restyling Side Effects
  const mib = viewof styledBtn2.querySelector('button.btn-quarto');
  if (mib) {
    mib.classList.remove('btn-quarto');
    mib.classList.add("btn", "btn-success", "btn-lg"); 
  }
};

item.title: BsParser
item.description:
Validate an bsInput with one super_bcv_wrapper

import { bsInputgroupTransform } from "./bsui.js"
import { super_bcv_parser } from "./bsBcv.js";

superBCV = new super_bcv_parser() // instance of singleton parser

viewof refInput = new bsInputgroupTransform({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-book'></i>",
  placeholder: "Enter Bible reference…",
//  transform: s => superBCV.osis_array(s),     // <---- HERE
  transform: superBCV.osis_array,     // <---- HERE
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "CLIP"
}).node()

refInput.current
refInput

item.title: ButtonsMobile
item.description: Buttons from Naked to Bootstrap styling
